description: Annual realised CNY 1-year China Government Bond (CGB) yield and CSI 300 total-return history, 2014-2025, used to drive the Phase 13 Task 5 out-of-sample backtest (Gate G-09). This is an EDUCATIONAL PROXY series approximating published ChinaBond / CSI / Wind levels; it is NOT a credentialled vendor feed and must be replaced with a licensed market-data extract before any regulatory or capital-adequacy use.
source_detail: ChinaBond 1Y CGB year-end yield + CSI 300 calendar-year total return (educational proxy series, vendor feed not yet credentialled)

primary_sources: ChinaBond China Government Bond yield curve (1Y point), annual year-end snapshots
data_lineage.production_restriction: Proxy levels only. Replace with licensed ChinaBond/CSI/Wind extracts and re-run sign-off before regulatory or capital-adequacy use.

notes: 12 annual observations (>= 10 required by G-09 criterion 1). Calibration uses the 7-year in-sample window (2014-2020); the 5-year out-of-sample holdout (2021-2025) is used for genuine out-of-sample band/VaR validation. Educational proxy - not a credentialled vendor feed.
